name: Onboarding Wizard
description: Gateway archetype for multi-step new-user onboarding flows. Three-step wizard pattern: account creation, profile completion (with photo upload), and interests selection. Each step occupies its own route on the centered shell with a stepper progress indicator at the top. Designed for consumer apps where post-auth profile completion is required before entering the primary app surface.

pages.description: Step 1 of 3 — basic account creation. Email + password fields with stepper showing progress.
directives: Show step indicator: 1 of 3, active dot in coral, upcoming dots in muted border style
Validate email format inline as user types (with 240ms debounce)
Password strength meter shows below the field — coral=weak, accent=medium, success=strong
Primary CTA label: 'Continue →' — disabled until form is valid
Secondary text below form: 'Already have an account? Log in' — link to /login

pages.description: Step 2 of 3 — basic profile (age, gender, location, bio) plus photo upload.
directives: Show step indicator: 2 of 3, dot 1 in success-state (filled coral with check), dot 2 active, dot 3 muted
Photo uploader at the top: large dashed-border drop zone with cloud icon. Tap on mobile opens native picker. Selected photo shows with a small Edit overlay button.
Form fields: Age (number input, 18+ required), Gender (3-option select with Other text input), Location (city autocomplete), Bio (textarea, 1-3 sentence guidance, 280 char limit with counter)
All fields except Bio are required. Bio shows 'optional but recommended' helper text.
Primary CTA: 'Continue →' — disabled until age + gender + location are valid AND a photo is uploaded
Secondary text: 'Skip for now' (smaller, ghost link) — only enabled if photo is uploaded; profile completion can finish in app

pages.description: Step 3 of 3 — pick interests from a multi-select chip grid (8-12 categories, choose 3-5).
directives: Show step indicator: 3 of 3, dots 1 and 2 in success state, dot 3 active
Heading above chip grid: 'What are you into?' (large, display font)
Sub-heading: 'Pick 3-5 interests so we can introduce you to your circle.'
Default interest chips: Music, Travel, Fitness, Food, Movies, Books, Gaming, Outdoors, Art, Tech, Wellness, Animals — 12 categories, all selectable simultaneously
Validation: minimum 3 selected, maximum 5. Below 3: helper text turns danger color. Above 5: chips lock and show 'Max 5 reached' tooltip
Primary CTA label: 'Complete Profile →' — disabled until 3-5 chips are selected
On submit: POST profile, route to /discover (the primary swipe feed)

page_briefs.account-step: Single centered card on a soft warm peach background. Card has 24px radius and a soft coral-tinted shadow. At the top of the card, a horizontal stepper: three numbered dots with a connecting line, dot 1 is active (filled coral), dots 2-3 are muted with thin borders. Below the stepper: 'Create your account' display heading. Email field (full width, rounded input with focus glow), password field with strength meter dot row beneath, and a 'Continue →' coral pill CTA at the bottom. The card is just wide enough (~420px) to feel comfortable but not stretched. Below the card, a small ghost link: 'Already have an account? Log in'. Form errors appear inline beneath the offending field in danger color.
page_briefs.profile-step: Same centered-card shell as step 1, but slightly taller. Stepper at the top now shows dot 1 in success-state (filled coral with white check), dot 2 active, dot 3 muted. Heading: 'Tell us about you'. The photo uploader sits prominently at the top — a large dashed-border drop zone or, after selection, a circular preview with the swipecircle-photo-frame decorator (96×96, coral ring). Below the photo: a stack of form fields with generous vertical spacing (16px gap). Age (number input), Gender (3-button radio group + Other text input), Location (autocomplete with current-location button), Bio (rounded textarea with character counter). Continue button at bottom, with 'Skip for now' ghost link below. The whole flow feels intimate and unhurried.
page_briefs.interests-step: Centered card. Stepper shows dots 1 and 2 complete (success-coral with checks), dot 3 active. Display heading: 'What are you into?' followed by a sub-heading explaining the choose-3-5 contract. The main content is a chip-multiselect grid: 12 chips (Music, Travel, Fitness, Food, Movies, Books, Gaming, Outdoors, Art, Tech, Wellness, Animals) wrap in a flex grid with 8px gap. Unselected chips have a thin border + muted text; selected chips fill with coral, show a check icon, and bounce on toggle. A counter below ('3 of 3-5') gives feedback. Once 3 are selected, the 'Complete Profile' coral pill activates with a subtle pulse to invite the next step. On submit, the card scales down briefly with a celebratory sparkle effect, then routes to /discover.

directives: All three steps use the swipecircle theme — warm peach backgrounds, coral primaries, pill CTAs
Stepper component is consistent across all 3 pages — only the dot states change
After step 3 success, route to /discover (the primary app surface)
If user reloads mid-flow, persist progress in localStorage so they don't lose state
Each step's primary CTA is disabled until validation passes — no ghost-clicking through invalid steps

shells.centered: Single centered card on a soft warm peach background. Card max-width ~420px on tablet+, full-width on mobile with 16px page padding. Stepper at top of card.

personality: Three-step gateway flow that feels gentle and unhurried. Centered card on warm peach background, coral primary CTAs, soft shadows replacing harsh borders. Stepper at the top tracks progress — dots fill with coral as steps complete. Forms validate inline with friendly error copy. Photo upload is photographed-portrait in mind — circular preview with swipecircle-photo-frame ring. Interest picker uses chip-multiselect with bouncy spring on toggle. The whole flow is intimate, warm, and rewards completion with a sparkle moment before routing into the app.
